visual_dna: Are shapes strictly geometrically consistent and sharply defined?
Does the asset maintain a consistent heavy outer stroke weight?
Are internal details drawn with thinner, secondary strokes?
Does the color palette map correctly to standard (single accent) or epic (neon highlights) rarities?
product_logic: Does the silhouette convey the asset's function within the 3-second readability rule?
If upgraded, does it maintain the original bounding silhouette?
technical_excellence: Are all line details crisp and perfectly legible at 64x64px thumbnail size?
Are colors purely flat and cel-shaded without anti-aliasing blur or unwanted gradients?
Are ink layers clearly separated visually from color fills allowing modular recoloring?

forbidden_elements: Over-complicated noise patterns that break thumbnail legibility
